name: Producer Studio Marketing
description: Public Producer Studio surface led by a real DAW cockpit preview, then concise proof sections for arrangement, mixer, collaboration, splits, and pricing.
visual_brief: Commercial product homepage led by the actual DAW cockpit. The first viewport should feel like entering a live studio session: compact brand/nav, product-name headline, prominent cockpit preview with titlebar/status, transport, arrangement, inspector, mixer, and collaborators. Supporting copy is short and studio-literate. Marketing proof sections follow as quiet full-width bands, not a pile of generic cards. The brand/product must be obvious in the first viewport on every screen size.

responsive.mobile: Cockpit preview appears before long copy. It uses compact transport, scrollable arrangement preview, abbreviated inspector/status, and horizontal mixer strips. CTAs remain below the product object without covering it.
responsive.tablet: Cockpit stacks above or beside compact copy while preserving product detail.
responsive.desktop: Use an immersive product-first hero with the cockpit as the dominant object; keep a hint of the next proof section visible.

keyboard: Tab order moves from nav to primary CTA to cockpit controls without trapping focus
accessibility.notes: Decorative waveform bars should be aria-hidden; cockpit status text should be readable outside color alone.

directives: The first viewport must be product-first: a live-looking DAW cockpit preview with transport, arrangement, mixer/meters, status, and collaborators.
Do not lead with a generic centered hero plus cards. Marketing content follows the cockpit preview.
Use concise studio-literate copy and avoid stock SaaS phrasing.
Hero headline can support the product, but the DAW preview is the hero object.
Keep the next section visible below the first viewport on desktop and mobile.

page_briefs.home: Public home opens with a premium DAW cockpit preview: top nav, compact headline, sticky-looking transport, arrangement canvas, mixer meters, active collaborators, and session/export status. Below it, concise proof sections explain arrangement, mixer, live rooms, split validation, and pricing.

shells.top-nav-footer: Public shell with compact top navigation, cockpit-first hero, and footer
